raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 28,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un Sauls redfeja/ un no-
mannija ka tas KUNGS ar
Dahwidu bija/ un Mikale Sau-
la Metta mihleja winnu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 29,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad bihjajabs Sauls no
winna wehl wairak/ un Sauls
eenihdeja Dahwidu / kamehr
wiꞥſch dshwoja.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 30,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Rad nu fo Wilisteru Leeli-
kungi isgahje/ tad tas netikkahe
winneem iseijoht / ka Dahwids
gudraks bija ne ka wiſti Saula
Kalpi/ ta ka winna Wahrdz toh-
ti eezeenihts ktuii.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ad runnaja Sauls ar
fawu Dehlu Jonatanu/
un ar wiſſeem faweem
Kalpeem/ ka tee Dahwidu nokan-
tu. Bet Jonatanam Saula Deh-
lam bija labs Prahts pee Dah-
wida.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un Jonatans pastabstija
Dahwidam to / fazzidains :
Mans Tehws Sauls mekle tew
nokant/ nu tad/ fargajs jelle rib-
tu / un turrajs fleppeni un ap-
fleppees.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Bet es iſeeschu un stahwe-
schu pee manna Tehwa Rohkas
Laufâ/ kur tu buhſi/ un runna-
schu ar mannu Tehwu tewis
pehz/ un redseschu/ kas tur buhs/
un paſluddinaschu tew to.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad runnaja Jonatans
labbu no Dahwida us fawu Teh-
wu Saulu/ unfazztja usto : Laid
tas Kehnixsch ne apgrehkojahs
prett fawu Kalpu Dahwidu / jo
wiſſch prett tew ne irr grehkojs /
un winna Darbi nahk tew war-
ren tohti par labbu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Jo wiſſch irr fawu Dsh-
wibu fawa Rohkâ lizzis/ un to
Wilisteri kawis/ un tas KUNGS
irr leelu Pestischanu wiﬀam I-
sraetaim dewis. To eſti tu redsejs
un preezajees/ kapehz tad gribbe-
tu tu prett nenostedsigu Affini
grehkoht/ Dahwidu bes Wainags
nokaudams?
"
    },
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un Sauls paklausija Jo-
nataka Balsnet: un Sauls no-
ſwehrejahs : Tik teescham ka tas
KUNGS dshwo / tam ne buhs
nokautam tapt.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un Jonatans aizinaja Dah-
widu : Un Jonatans flahstija
Dahwidam wiſſis scho hs Wahr-
dus; un Jonatans wedde Dah-
widu precksch Saula/ un tasbija
winna Preekſchá/ ka zittkahrt.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad zehlehs attak Karsch/
un Dahwids isgahje/ un karroja
ar teem Wilistereem / un kawe
tohs ar leelu Kanschanu/ un tee
behdfe preekſch winna.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Bet tas tauns Gars ta
Bbbb 2
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
